training_status: plays hockey twice a week, rehabbing knee injury

benefits.description: Lost about 20lbs in 6-7 weeks on first vial
Initial hunger suppression and reduction of food noise

side_effects.description: Sensitive skin from time to time
Occasional bout of nausea when eating

protocol_notes: Started Retatrutide mid-October 2025. First vial successful. Switched to second vial a few weeks after finishing first, but experienced loss of appetite suppression within days. Suspected bad vial, tried third vial with same result. Currently on 9mg/week split into two doses. Ordered from new supplier to test hypothesis. Started TRT in December 2025 (age 47). Using BPC-157 for knee injury rehabilitation. Gained muscle and some water weight from TRT, experiencing body recomp.
